task: Accounting Periods Init — ops seed for Jan–Jun 2026 periods for TRANSP (IH 35 Transportation LLC). Adds unique index on (operating_company_id, period_start) for idempotent ON CONFLICT semantics. Registers two guard flags in lib.feature_flags: PERIODS_INIT_ENABLED (controls whether the 6-row INSERT executes; default false) and OPENING_BALANCE_BOOKKEEPER_CONFIRM (bookkeeper sign-off gate; default false, never auto-posted by any migration). No opening-balance journal entries written. GATED: bookkeeper must sign off before prod posting.
financial_rule: No journal entries written. No balances fabricated. Seed INSERT is behind PERIODS_INIT_ENABLED flag (default false). OPENING_BALANCE_BOOKKEEPER_CONFIRM flag registered as default false — entry point only, no auto-post.
